PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Mangonon in Propria Persona.

The Court asked Mr. Mangonon if he knew what the next steps were, confirmed that he had read through the duties and liabilities, suggested that he could possibly file an affidavit 13101 since there is only $65,700.00 in the estate and that it would save money and time. Mr. Manganon stated that the credit union wanted letters testamentary. The Court stated that he had filed the duties and liabilities, confirmed again that he had read the entire document, confirmed that the credit union will not release funds without an appointment and asked Mr. Mangonon what the next steps would be. Mr. Manganon stated that he would secure the money, distribute to the heirs (himself and his son) and report back to the court. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Charlene Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Cho. (Not Reported)
